text.title: Cognitive Walkthrough Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Cognitive Walkthrough to a concrete case.

section.title: Field-service expense submission

example.code:
Task: Submit expense report (first-time field tech). Evaluators: E1, E2.
Step 1 — Open expenses tab Q1 yes / Q2 yes / Q3 yes / Q4 yes Step 2 — Tap '+ New expense' Q1 yes / Q2 no (button hidden behind FAB) / Q3 yes / Q4 yes
Finding: Step 2 Q2 major — FAB hides primary action. Recommendation: surface 'New expense' as inline button on empty state.

section.note: Per-step Q1-Q4 + severity + recommendation make the report actionable.
